verses.text: Jerusalem khuapi a kilak zawh a kum sawmlelina kum, salin hong kipaipih zawh a kum sawmnihlengana, a kha masa a ni sawm ni-in ka sungah Topa' vangliatna hong om lamtak ka kiphawk a, amah in kei hong paikhiatpih hi
Ka maang sungah, Pasian in Israel gamah hong paipih a, mual sang khat tungah hong koih hi. Khuapi tawh a kibang inn honpi bang khat ka mai-ah ka mu hi
Amah in tua khuapi nai-ah hong paipih a, sumngo bangin a te mi khat ka mu hi. Tua mipa in pikhau khat leh piciang khat tawi a, kongpi gei-ah a ding hi

Tua mipa in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, tu-a kong lah ding nate, na mit tawh limtakin enin, na bil tawh limtakin ngai in la, limtakin ngaihsun in. Hih lai-ah nang kong paipihna pen hih thu hang mah ahi hi. Na muh na khempeuhte, Israel mite tungah a gen ding na hi hi,” hong ci hi
Ka muh pen biakinn na hi a, a kimkotah kulh om hi. A mipa in pi sawm a pha tehna piciang la-in a kulh a teh hi. A teh ciangin pi sawm sahin, pi sawm mah sang hi
Tua ciangin nisuahna lama om kulhkongpi-ah amah pai a, a kahlei-ah kahto-in a khung a tun' ciangin kulh kongvang teh a, pi sawm mah sang hi

Tua banah lampi khat om a, a lampi pang tuakah galvilna inndei neu thum tuak om hi. Inndei neute a dung a vai kikim a, pi sawm mah ahi hi. Inndei neu khatlekhat kikal pi giat sah hi. Tua galvilna inndei neute banah pi sawm mah a sau lampi khat om a, biakinnpi lam a maingat inndei golzaw sung a tung hi
Hih inndei golzaw a teh ciangin pi sawmleli pha hi
Hih inndei pen biakinn tun'na ding lampi tawpna hi a, a biakinn lam neh pena om kawm pen pi li a sah hi
(Hih lampi pang tuaka om galvilna inndei neute pen a golna kikim a, a kikala kawmte zong a sahna kikim hi
Tua ciangin a mipa in a lampi teh a, pi sawmleguk zai-in pi sawmnihlenih a sau hi
Tua galvilna inndei neu mai ciatah letmat sawmnih sangin letmat sawmnih a sah kidalna khat a om hi. (Hih galvilna inndei neute pen a dung a vai pi sawm tuak ahi hi
Tua ciangin inndei neu kawm nung panin lampi kantanin a gal sana inndei neu kawm nung dong teh a, pi sawmlenih a pha hi
Inndei nunung pen zomah biakinn tual om a, tua tual a teh ciangin pi sawmthumleli a pha hi
Kulhkong pua panin inndei nawlnung kawm pua dong lampi sauna pi sawmgiatli a pha hi
Hih inndei neute' kawm a pualam pangah tawlet neu om a, inndei kikala om kawm tungah zong a vang neu om hi. Lampi omna lampang, inndei kikala kawmte tungah nisuh kung lim kibawl hi
Tua ciangin a mipa in kongpi tawnin a tualah hong paipih hi. A tual pualam kawm tawh kizomin inndei sawmthum om a, tua inndeite mai-ah suang a kiphah lampi om hi
Hih suangphah pen a tual kimkotah om a, hih a pualama tual pen a sunglama om tual sangin niamzaw hi
Tua ciangin a sunglam tual lutna dingin a sangzaw-ah kongpi khat om hi. A mipa in hih kongpi nih kikal a teh ciangin pi za khat sawmgukgiat a pha hi
Tua ciangin a mipa in a pualam tual paina ahi, leilu lampangah a om kongpi lampi hong teh hi

Tua bangin a teh ciangin lampi pang tuaka om galvilna inndei neu thumte, a kikala om kawmte, leh a inndei golzaw pen, nisuahna kongpi-ate mah bangin a dung a vai kikim ciat hi. Tua kongpi lampi pen pi sawmgiatli sau a, pi sawmlinih zai hi

A inndei golzaw, a tawlette, leh nisuh kung lim a kibawlte pen nisuahna lam kongpi-a omte mah tawh kibangin kikim hi. Hih lai-ah zong kongpi lampi tun'na dingin kahlei dawl sagih om a, a nawlnunga om a inndei golzaw pen in a tual lam maingat hi

Nisuahna lampanga om bang teek mahin, leilu lam kongpi pana lutna-a a tual galkhatah tual sungnung lutna kongpi lampi khat mah a om hi. Tua kongpi nih kikal a teh ciangin pi za leh sawmgukgiat a sau hi
Tua ciangin a mipa in leitaw lampangah hong paipih a, tua lai-ah kongpi lampi khat mah na om leuleu hi. A teh ciangin a dangte mah tawh kikim hi
Kongpi danga omte mah bangin hih lai-ah zong inndeite in tawlet nei uh hi. A kongpi lampi pen pi sawmgiatli sau-in pi sawmlinih zai hi
Tua kongpi lampi tun'na dingin kahlei cial sagih mah om a, a inndei golzaw pen a nawlnung mahah omin a tual lam a nga hi. Lampi omna lampang, kawm sungnungte' tungah nisuh kung lim mah kibawl hi
Hih lai-ah zong tual sungnung paina kongpi lampi khat mah om hi. A mipa in konglekong kikal a teh ciangin pi za leh sawmgukgiat a pha hi
Tua ciangin leitaw lam kongpi tawnin tual sungnungah hong paipih hi. A lampi a teh ciangin a dangte mah tawh kikim hi

A galvilna inndei neute, a inndei golzaw, leh kawm sungnungte pen, kongpi dangate mah tawh kibang hi. Hih kongpi lama om inndei neute-ah zong tawlet om hi. A lampi pi sawmgiatli sau-in, pi sawmlinih zai hi
A inndei golzaw pen tual puanung lam a nga hi. Lampi pang tuaka kawmte tungah nisuh kung lim kibawl a, hih kongpi lampi tun'na dingin kahlei cial giat a om hi
Tua ciangin nisuahna lam kongpi tawnin a tual sungnungah hong paipih hi. A lampi a teh ciangin a dangte mah tawh kikim hi

A galvilna inndei neute, a inndei golzaw, leh a kawm sungnungte zong, kongpi dangate mah tawh kikim hi. A kimkotah tawlette om a, a inndei golzaw-ah zong a om hi. A lampi, pi sawmgiatli sau a, pi sawmlinih zai hi
A inndei golzaw pen a tual puanung lam nga hi. Lampi pang tuakah a om kawmte tungah nisuh kung lim kibawl a, hih kongpi lampi tun'na dingin kahlei cial giat a om hi
Tua ciangin leilu lam kongpi lampi-ah hong paipih a, a teh ciangin a dangte mah tawh kibang hi
A dangte mah bangin hih in zong galvilna inndei neute, kawmsung lam tung kizemte, inndei golzaw pen, leh a kimkotah tawlette a nei hi. A lampi pi sawmgiatli sau a, pi sawmlinih zai hi
A inndei golzaw pen a tual puanung lam nga hi. Lampi pang tuakah a om kawmte tungah nisuh kung lim kibawl a, hih kongpi lampi tun'na dingin kahlei cial giat a om hi
Tual puanung sungah lampi tawh a kimatin inndei gol khat om a, a inndei pen a tual lam a nga hi. Hih lai munah, biakna-in a pum-a a hal ding uh ganhing luangte silsiang uh hi

Hih inndei gol sungah sabuai li om a, a lang tuakah nih tuakin kikoih hi. Meihal biakna-a piak ding ahi a, mawhna leh khialhna hanga biakna-in piak ding ganhingte ahi zongin, hih sabuaite tungah go uh hi
Hih inndei pualam, leilu lam kongpi lutna pang tuakah zong sabuai nih tuak, a vekin sabuai li mah om hi
Tua ahih manin inndei sungah sabuai li, a pua-ah sabuai li, a vekpi-in giat om a, hih sabuaite pen, biakna-in piak ding ganhingte gawhna-in a kizang ahi hi

Meihal biakna-in piak ding ganhingte bawlna dingin a kizang sabuai lite pen suang a kiseek ahi hi. Tua sabuaite letmat sawmnih sang a, a dung a vai letmat sawmthum tuak ahi hi. Biakna-in piak ding gan gawhna-in a zat uh na khempeuh, hih sabuaite tungah koih uh hi
Hih sabuaite' kimkotah khutpeek cia bang a zai geihual kibawl hi. Biakna-in piak ding sa khempeuh hih sabuaite tungah kikoih hi

Tua ciangin a pualam panin a tual sungnungah hong paipih a, a tual sungnungah inndei nih na om hi. Khat pen leilu lam kongpi lampangah omin leitaw lam nga a, a khat pen leitaw lam kongpi lampangah omin leilu lam nga hi
A mipa in kei kiangah hih bangin hong gen hi: Leitaw lam a nga inndei pen biakinn sungah na a sem siampite-a' ding hi a

leilu lam a nga inndei pen biakna tau-ah na a sem siampite-a' ding ahi hi. Tua siampite khempeuh pen Zadok' suan Levi mite vive ahi uh hi. Ama na a sem dingin Topa ' omna-ah amaute bek kipaisak hi, hong ci hi
A mipa in hih tual sungnung a teh ciangin a dung a vai pi za khat sawmgukgiat tuak a pha hi. A biakinn mai-ah biakna tau khat a om hi
Tua ciangin biakinn sung lutna inndei-ah hong paipih hi. Amah in a sung lutna lampi teh a, pi kua sau-in pi sawmnihli zai a, a pang tuaka kawmte pi nga tuak a sah hi
Innsung lutna inndei pen pi sawmthumli sau a, pi sawmnih zai a, tua lai tun'na dingin kahlei cial sawm a om hi. Innsung lutna inndei pang tuakah khuampi khat tuak a om hi.
